title: Lentil Jjigae Tacos
description: A spicy, savory fusion of Korean and Mexican flavors, featuring lentils and a tangy jjigae sauce.

ingredients.name: Tangy Jjigae Sauce
ingredients.notes: from a Korean market or homemade

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tsp of cumin and 1 tsp of Korean chili flakes (if using) and cook for 1 minute.
Add 1/2 cup of rough chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add 1 cup of lentils and 2 tbsp of tangy jjigae sauce. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add 2 tbsp of tomato paste (if using) and cook for an additional minute.
Warm tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble tacos by spooning lentil mixture onto a tortilla, topping with cilantro and a dollop of sour cream (if using).
